name: ofac-sanctions-screening
summary: OFAC, sanctions, PEP & KYB screening for Python — screen names, companies & crypto wallets against OFAC SDN, EU, UK, UN + 100+ watchlists, plus 23 KYB / reference-data validators (LEI/GLEIF, US EIN, ABA routing, Australian ABN, Brazil CNPJ, LATAM tax-IDs, SWIFT/BIC, India GSTIN & PAN, GTIN/GLN, ISIN/CUSIP/SEDOL, DUNS, CAGE, EORI, IMEI, phone/E.164, UK VAT). Free demo, no key.
author: GoCreative
